creator: stenn@nwtime.org
text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #76)

I'm curious about this one, Cy.  This used to be recommended practice before we had the -g option to ntpd, but we're 95%+ comfortable saying that it's no longer needed.  I've had one person say they know cases where it matters, but I haven't seen the supporting information yet.
